title: HFBK Raumplan
description: Fun website presenting the Design course of University of Fine Arts of Hamburg.

worldSystems.name: Playable Poster

worldSystems.name: Collage Core

archetype.name: Playable Poster
archetype.reason: tags include colorful; tags include typography; sticky layout

mechanics.interactionModel: One-screen poster composition with one or two high-conviction interactions such as drag, reveal, type morph, or hover distort.
mechanics.navigationModel: The page behaves like one campaign object or a short sequence of staged frames.
mechanics.stateModel: Poster at rest -> big reveal -> one interactive transformation -> rest or reset.
engineHints: Use motion/react or GSAP for bold but finite timelines.
Use SVG path animation and variable font APIs for draw-on or type-shift moments.
Keep the DOM shallow; the composition should feel authored, not modular.
motionRecipe: Use oversized type or graphic elements as moving actors, not background garnish.
Keep only one hero gesture alive on mobile.
mechanics.mobileFallback: Split the poster into two to four scenes, preserve one hero interaction, and drop hover-only secondary behavior.
implementationNotes: Use scale, typography, and dead space aggressively; do not fill every region with content.
Keep the interaction count low and the conviction high.
If a visual move is the identity, it should land before the user sees the CTA.
The capture suggests anchored framing or sticky context; preserve that orientation device in the rebuild.
antiPatterns: Do not let the page collapse into a static poster with a button pasted on it.
Do not attach random microinteractions to every element.
Do not keep a desktop-only hover trick as the main story.
validationChecklist: The hero gesture is obvious in under three seconds.
Desktop and mobile preserve the same campaign idea with different staging.
Typography remains part of the interaction system.

designGuidance.implementationPrompt: Build this as a Playable Poster page with a secondary cue from Collage Core using the Playable Poster interaction model. Keep timesnewarial as the voice anchor, preserve the palette around #000000, #f4f6f7, #a0a0a0, drive the page through scroll, tap, hover, and implement the mobile fallback as: Split the poster into two to four scenes, preserve one hero interaction, and drop hover-only secondary behavior.
designGuidance.summary: Playable Poster + Playable Poster. One-screen poster composition with one or two high-conviction interactions such as drag, reveal, type morph, or hover distort.
